title: Carbon Chemistry Basics
description: Learn about different forms of carbon

questions.question: Diamond and Graphite are _________ of Carbon.
questions.explanation: Diamond and graphite are allotropes of carbon - different structural forms of the same element.

questions.question: Which of the following is the hardest natural substance?
questions.explanation: Diamond is the hardest natural substance known due to its strong covalent network structure.

questions.question: Graphite is used in pencils because it is:
questions.explanation: Graphite has layered structure that slides easily, making it perfect for writing.
